name: joaoin0x-cc-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugins by joaoin0x

plugins.name: local-code-review
plugins.description: Multi-agent code review for local changes (staged, unstaged, commits, branches)

plugins.name: clickup-code-review
plugins.description: Multi-agent code review lifecycle with ClickUp integration: audit, planning, fixing, and testing with Devil's Advocate filtering and evidence-based status gates

plugins.name: claude-session-guardian
plugins.description: Monitor Claude Code 5-hour rate limit window and orchestrate cooperative pause/resume. Graduated warnings at 70%/82%, automatic pause at 90% with checkpoint + CronCreate resume after reset.
